item.text: {"verdicts":[{"finding_id":"F-005","verdict":"resolved","note":"The follow-up removes the unsupported claim that the short -o alias was live exercised, pins the verified resume contract to --output-last-message, and explicitly scopes -o to help-only observation."}],"new_findings":[],"summary":"The remaining F-005 concern is resolved by aligning the pin text with the actual long-form contract coverage and documenting the short alias limitation."}
